definition: used before a noun to mean one, or any single one that is not specific
example: Kindra screamed and climbed onto the couch because she spotted a single tiny bug across the room.

definition: having to do with a subject; on the topic of; or nearly, close to a number
example: Kindra knows everything about anime but somehow nothing about how to win a hand of poker.

definition: following in time or order; later than something else
example: After losing at poker again, Kindra treated herself to a Jimmy John's sandwich to feel better.

definition: one more time; once more
example: Kindra bluffed and lost her whole poker stack again, blaming her glasses for fogging up.

definition: every one or the whole amount of something
example: Moose ate all of Kindra's Jimmy John's sandwich while she was busy watching anime.

definition: before now or before a certain time; sooner than expected
example: By 9 a.m. Kindra had already binged three movies and named a spider she refused to kill.

definition: in addition; as well; too
example: Kindra teaches sports medicine and also somehow finds time to watch every movie ever made.

definition: at all times; every time; forever
example: Kindra always loses at poker but insists her terrible bluffing is actually a genius strategy.

definition: the form of the verb 'be' used with 'I' in the present time
example: "I am absolutely not touching that bug," Kindra announced, sprinting out of the room.

definition: used before a word starting with a vowel sound to mean one, or any single one
example: Kindra can quote an entire anime episode from memory but forgets where she left her glasses.

definition: one more of the same kind; a different one

definition: one or some, no matter which; even a small amount

definition: on every side of something, or in a circle; near a place
example: Kindra had to reach up and stand on her toes to grab the mug from the shelf around the corner.

definition: used to compare things, or to mean while or because
example: Kindra is as short as she is fierce, and Moose still looks up at her like a giant.

definition: used to show a place, time, or point where something happens
example: Kindra is amazing at trivia but shockingly bad at keeping a poker face.

definition: to or at a distance from a place or person

definition: the part of the body behind you, or a return to where you were before
example: Kindra climbed halfway up the rock wall before a spider made her want to come back down.

definition: not good; unpleasant or of poor quality

definition: built or formed using something as the main foundation or starting point

definition: to exist, or to have a certain quality or identity

definition: the past form of the verb 'be', showing something has existed or happened

definition: earlier than something; in front of in time or order

definition: a living creature, or the state of existing right now

definition: to think that something is true or real

definition: better than all the others; of the highest quality

definition: of higher quality than another; more useful, skilled, or pleasing

definition: in the space or time that separates two things

definition: large in size, amount, or importance

definition: the two together; the one and the other

definition: the work of buying, selling, or making things to earn money; a company

definition: used to join two ideas that are different or opposite

definition: near or beside; or used to show who did something

definition: to say something loudly, to give a name to, or to speak on the phone

definition: gave a name to; shouted out; or telephoned someone

definition: the past form of 'come'; moved toward or arrived at a place

definition: to be able to do something; or a metal container for food or drink

definition: to feel concern about someone or something, or to look after them

definition: a particular situation or example, or a container that holds something

definition: a large town where many people live and work

definition: not the same as another; unlike in some way

definition: carrying out or performing an action right now

definition: finished or completed; no longer needing to be worked on

definition: toward or in a lower place; from a higher point to a lower one

definition: each one of a group, without leaving any out

definition: not costing any money, or not held or controlled by anyone

definition: moving or traveling toward a place; on the way somewhere

definition: a person who manages or provides large amounts of money for businesses
example: No financier in Las Vegas could ever fund the amount Kindra loses at the poker table each week.

definition: the splitting of something into parts, especially an atom's nucleus to release energy
example: Kindra explained nuclear fission to her sports medicine class, then admitted she just wanted an excuse to say 'splitting.'

definition: the ability to speak, read, or write smoothly and easily
example: Kindra has such fluency in anime plot lines that she recaps entire seasons faster than they aired.

definition: the leaves of plants and trees
example: Kindra refuses to hike through thick foliage because that is exactly where the bugs like to lurk.

definition: a tiny pocket in the skin from which a hair grows

definition: to lose or give up something as a penalty for breaking a rule
example: Kindra had to forfeit the poker pot again, mostly because she showed everyone her cards by accident.

definition: dishonest and meant to trick or cheat people
example: Kindra called Moose's sad puppy eyes a fraudulent trick to score a bite of her Jimmy John's sub.

definition: a tube that is wide at the top and narrow at the bottom, used to pour liquid into a small opening

definition: an embarrassing mistake made in front of other people

definition: a newspaper or official journal that shares news

definition: a constellation and star sign represented by twins

definition: relating to old age and the care of elderly people

definition: a young goose

definition: a small, harmless weakness or fault in a person's character
example: Kindra's one charming foible is naming every spider before she runs screaming from it.

definition: a tough, smooth plastic material used to cover tabletops and counters
example: Kindra slid her Jimmy John's across the formica counter and Moose was already waiting.

definition: a noisy quarrel or disturbance
example: A friendly trivia game turned into a fracas the second someone questioned Kindra's anime knowledge.

definition: a person who walks and performs on a tightrope
example: Balancing on a narrow climbing ledge, Kindra felt like a tiny redheaded funambulist.

definition: able to be exchanged for another identical item of the same kind
example: To Kindra, every poker chip is fungible right up until she loses the very last one.

definition: to shock or excite people into taking action
example: Nothing can galvanize Kindra into sprinting like a cockroach darting across the floor.

definition: a person who loves and knows a great deal about good food
example: Kindra calls herself a serious gastronome whose entire cuisine revolves around Jimmy John's.

definition: a cowboy of the South American plains
example: Kindra watched a gaucho ride across the plains and immediately added it to her movie list.

definition: showy or flashy decoration or finery
example: Kindra decorated her trivia table with so much gaudery it looked like an anime awards show.

definition: relating to the study of family history and ancestors
example: Kindra did a genealogical deep dive and was thrilled to find a redhead in every generation.

definition: closely connected and relevant to a subject being discussed
example: Kindra insists anime references are always germane, even during sports medicine lectures.

definition: to make lively hand and arm movements while speaking
example: Kindra gesticulate wildly when she explains anime plots, nearly knocking off her glasses.

definition: describing the moon when it is more than half but not fully lit
example: Kindra pointed at the gibbous moon and swore it looked exactly like Moose's face.

definition: a mild disease that makes the gums sore, red, and swollen
example: Kindra warns her sports medicine students that skipping toothpaste invites gingivitis.

definition: relating to fighters who battled for public entertainment in ancient Rome
example: Trivia night gets gladiatorial the moment someone challenges Kindra on anime facts.

definition: in music, a rapid slide up or down through a series of notes
example: Kindra hummed a dramatic glissando as she slowly slid back down the climbing wall.

definition: eating far too much in a greedy way
example: Kindra gets gluttonous the second a Jimmy John's sandwich is placed anywhere near her.

definition: twisted, rough, and knobby, like an old tree branch
example: Kindra gripped a gnarled tree root while climbing and hoped nothing was living inside it.

definition: a fine, thin, delicate material, like a spider's floating web threads
example: Kindra spotted a strand of gossamer, assumed a spider, and abandoned the hiking trail instantly.

definition: a mild, smooth yellow cheese that comes from the Netherlands
example: Kindra added extra gouda to her Jimmy John's and declared it the finest cheese in Las Vegas.

definition: a person who studies and knows a great deal about the rules of language
example: Kindra turns into a strict grammarian when someone misspells her favorite anime title.

definition: the smallest written unit that represents a sound in a language, such as a single letter or a group of letters
example: Kindra explained that every grapheme in an anime title matters when she's playing trivia.

definition: a person who studies handwriting, often claiming to judge someone's character from it
example: A graphologist studied Kindra's handwriting and concluded she'd been rushing to catch a movie.

definition: the quality of being strange, ugly, or distorted in a way that seems unnatural

definition: relating to a governor or to the office of governor
example: Kindra answered the gubernatorial trivia question correctly and took a tiny victory bow.

definition: relating to the sense of taste
example: For Kindra, no gustatory experience beats the first bite of a Jimmy John's sandwich.

definition: made or produced deep in the throat, describing a harsh or rough sound
example: Kindra let out a guttural yell that scared Moose when a beetle crossed the kitchen floor.

definition: a soft white or gray mineral used to make plaster and chalk
example: Kindra chalked her hands with gypsum before the climb and still slid right off the wall.

definition: used so often that it is no longer interesting or original
example: Kindra groans at hackneyed anime plots, then watches all twelve episodes anyway.

definition: to see, hear, or feel something that is not really there
example: Kindra was so tired after a movie marathon she began to hallucinate that Moose could talk.

definition: a group or set of seven

definition: needing very great strength or effort

definition: in a way that is sealed so completely that no air can get in or out

definition: a pattern of slanting lines arranged in rows that point in opposite directions, like the bones of a fish

definition: a system of writing that uses pictures and symbols instead of letters, especially used in ancient Egypt
example: Kindra says her scribbled trivia notes look like ancient hieroglyphics by the end of the night.

definition: relating to the ancient Greek doctor Hippocrates or the promise doctors make to care for patients

definition: very dramatic or exaggerated behavior meant to get attention

definition: acting as if you are better or more important than other people

definition: a tall garden plant with large, colorful flowers growing up its stem
example: Kindra planted a towering hollyhock just so one thing in her garden would stand taller than her.

definition: the way a living body keeps its inside conditions, like temperature, steady and balanced

definition: a garden shrub with large rounded clusters of pink, blue, or white flowers

definition: a strong fear of water

definition: relating to growing plants in water with added nutrients instead of soil

definition: a constant and unnecessary worry about being sick
example: As a sports medicine teacher, Kindra can tell the difference between a real injury and a student's dramatic case of hypochondria.

definition: the longest side of a right triangle, opposite the right angle
example: Kindra is so short that when she leans against the climbing wall she basically becomes the shortest hypotenuse in the gym.

definition: having a rhythm of one soft beat followed by one strong beat, used in poetry
example: Kindra tried to narrate her anime marathon in iambic verse, but Moose kept barking on every strong beat.

definition: the special way a single person speaks, including their own words and habits
example: Kindra's idiolect is half sports medicine jargon and half quotes yelled at movie villains.

definition: unusual in a way that is special to one person
example: It is wonderfully idiosyncratic that Kindra names every poker hand she loses after a different anime character.

definition: causing shame or embarrassment; disgraceful
example: Kindra suffered an ignominious defeat at poker night, folding a winning hand because she thought the guy was bluffing.

definition: very famous and greatly admired for great achievements

definition: to kill or destroy something, especially by burning, as a sacrifice

definition: paint laid on a surface so thickly that you can see the raised brushstrokes

definition: having very little money; poor
example: After one long poker night, Kindra was so impecunious she could barely afford a single Jimmy John's sandwich.

definition: not allowing liquid or gas to pass through
example: Kindra wishes her apartment walls were impermeable to bugs the way her raincoat is to water.

definition: a person who organizes and manages concerts, plays, or other performances
example: Kindra runs her trivia team like a Broadway impresario, assigning everyone a category and demanding a standing ovation for correct anime answers.

definition: to teach an idea or habit to someone by repeating it many times

definition: protection or payment given to make up for a loss or damage

definition: not wanting to work or be active; lazy

definition: impossible to doubt; completely certain
example: It is indubitable that Kindra will scream if a moth flies within ten feet of her glasses.

definition: something that encourages a person to do something; a reward or reason to act

definition: too great or wonderful to be described in words
example: The joy Kindra feels after nailing a hard anime trivia question is truly ineffable.

definition: impossible to avoid or escape
example: For Kindra, losing at poker feels as ineluctable as her dog Moose stealing the warm spot on the bed.

definition: a strong but usually short-lived feeling of love or admiration for someone or something
example: Kindra's infatuation with Jimmy John's is so intense she can recite the whole menu faster than a trivia answer.

definition: able to catch fire and burn easily
example: Kindra keeps her anime figurines far from the stove because the boxes are dangerously inflammable.

definition: a block of metal, usually shaped like a brick, made by pouring melted metal into a mold
example: Kindra is so short she joked that lifting a metal ingot at the climbing gym counts as her whole leg day.

definition: to try to make someone like you by being especially nice or helpful

definition: harmful or unfriendly to someone or something

definition: to give someone a vaccine or medicine to protect them from a disease

definition: a feeling of worry or restlessness

definition: the act of putting a piece of equipment in place so it is ready to use

definition: the natural outer covering of an animal or plant, such as skin, a shell, or a rind

definition: having the form of a question or used to ask a question

definition: to scatter or place things here and there among other things

definition: refusing to change your opinion or behavior; very stubborn

definition: harsh or insulting words used to attack or blame someone

definition: so important or sacred that it must never be broken or harmed

definition: easily made angry; quick-tempered

definition: the act of leaving someone out of a group on purpose

definition: showing too much pride or confidence in yourself
example: Kindra strolled into trivia with overweening confidence, and this time she actually earned every point.

definition: a large thick-skinned animal such as an elephant or rhinoceros
example: Standing beside a pachyderm at the zoo made short little Kindra look truly tiny.

definition: a grand and colorful show, ceremony, or display
example: The pageantry of a new anime opening makes Kindra tear up every single time.

definition: an unhealthy pale color of the face
example: A single beetle scurried past and Kindra's face took on a pallor whiter than her Las Vegas walls.

definition: throbbing or beating quickly, as with a racing heart
example: Kindra's palpitant heart raced not from rock climbing but from a cricket hopping toward her.

definition: a small dog breed with large, fringed ears shaped like butterfly wings
example: Kindra loves Moose, but she jokes a tiny papillon would fit her short stature better.

definition: a tiny single-celled water creature shaped like a slipper
example: Kindra squinted through her glasses at a paramecium and still shuddered, convinced it was a tiny bug.

definition: the state of being the most important or having the highest rank
example: In Kindra's house, the paramountcy of Jimmy John's over every other sandwich is simply not up for debate.

definition: having to do with a group of elected people who make a country's laws
example: Kindra answered a parliamentary trivia question so fast the host checked if she was cheating.

definition: a name taken from the name of one's father or ancestor
example: Kindra joked that Moose deserved a patronymic, since he acts like the head of the household.

definition: a dessert made of crisp meringue topped with cream and fruit
example: Kindra tried making a pavlova during a movie marathon and set off the smoke alarm twice.

definition: having a soft, shiny glow like the inside of a seashell
example: Kindra's red hair looked almost pearlescent under the Las Vegas casino lights as she lost at poker again.

definition: to steal money that has been placed in your care
example: Moose likes to peculate the sandwiches Kindra leaves unguarded from Jimmy John's.

definition: relating to or involving money
example: Kindra's pecuniary losses at the poker table could have bought a lot of Jimmy John's.

definition: too much fussing over small rules or tiny details
example: As a sports medicine teacher, Kindra corrects your squat form with the pedantry of a true expert.

definition: hanging down loosely and able to swing
example: Kindra dangled from the climbing wall in a pendulous swing, laughing the whole way down.

definition: a prison for people who have committed serious crimes

definition: a garden plant with large, round, sweet-smelling flowers
example: Kindra planted a peony but abandoned the garden the moment a bee buzzed near it.

definition: able to be noticed or sensed

definition: commanding in a firm way that allows no argument or refusal

definition: the act of doing a play, song, or show in front of an audience

definition: a person who carries out a crime or wrongdoing

definition: the act of keeping on trying even when something is hard

definition: quick to notice and understand things clearly
example: Kindra is perspicacious at trivia night, spotting the answer before anyone else even reads the clue.

definition: able to be talked into agreeing or changing your mind
example: Kindra is highly persuasible when the words 'Jimmy John's' and 'anime marathon' are used together.

definition: the worst or least favorable condition for something to grow or work
example: For Kindra, a bug-filled campsite is the pessimum vacation spot imaginable.

definition: pictures or symbols carved into rock long ago

definition: the tube at the back of the throat that carries air and food

definition: the act of drawing blood from a vein for a test or donation

definition: calm and not easily excited or upset
example: Kindra stays phlegmatic during scary movies, then loses it completely when a real moth appears.

definition: a garden plant with clusters of small, colorful flowers

definition: the particular way words and phrases are chosen and put together
example: Kindra's anime phraseology has gotten so advanced that her friends need subtitles for her texts.

definition: the scientific study of algae and seaweed
example: Kindra briefly considered phycology, then decided seaweed was too close to something a sea bug might live in.

definition: a large group used to sort living things by their basic body plan

definition: a flat column shape built into a wall for support or decoration

definition: journeys made to a holy or special place
example: Kindra makes weekly pilgrimages to Jimmy John's like it is a sacred temple of sandwiches.

definition: praise and applause given for something done well
example: Kindra earned loud plaudits at trivia night, though her poker skills earned only pity.

definition: a full or plentiful amount of something
example: Kindra owns a plenitude of anime figures that somehow fills her whole Las Vegas apartment.

definition: easy to bend or shape without breaking
example: Years of rock climbing have made Kindra surprisingly pliant, bending into holds most people cannot reach.

definition: a tropical plant with sweet-smelling flowers often used in leis
example: Kindra wore a plumeria in her red hair until a bee investigated it and the flower went flying.

definition: a person who can speak or understand many languages

definition: a chain of many small building blocks that make up proteins

definition: the state of one word having several different meanings
example: Kindra loves the polysemy of trivia questions, where one tricky word hides several sneaky meanings.

definition: the act of behaving in an overly grand or self-important way
example: Kindra strutted with mock pomposity after finally winning a single hand of poker.

definition: a heavy grated gate that slides down to guard a castle entrance
example: Kindra wishes her front door had a portcullis to keep every last bug outside.

definition: seeming to be a sign that something important or bad will happen
example: A portentous buzzing filled the room, and Kindra knew a bug was about to ruin her movie night.

definition: a mix of dried flowers and spices used to make a room smell nice
example: Kindra keeps potpourri everywhere, secretly hoping the smell keeps the bugs far away.

definition: a difficult or tricky situation that is hard to escape
example: Kindra was in a real predicament: a spider sat on the remote during the best part of the anime.

definition: giving special or better treatment to one person or thing
example: Moose gets preferential treatment in Kindra's house, including the best seat during movie night.

definition: able to grip or wrap around things, like some animal tails
example: Kindra wishes she had a prehensile tail on the climbing wall to make up for her short reach.

definition: coming before the main part as a first step

definition: a feeling that something is going to happen before it does

definition: the state of being greater in number, weight, or importance
example: A preponderance of Kindra's phone photos are just Moose looking majestic.

definition: so silly or unlikely that it is hard to believe

definition: too bold in assuming or taking things without permission
example: It was presumptuous of the moth to land on Kindra's Jimmy John's sandwich, and it did not end well for the moth.

definition: coming before or getting ahead of something

definition: a small country or land ruled by a prince or princess
example: Kindra rules her Las Vegas apartment like a tiny principality where Moose is the pampered prince.

definition: helping to prove whether something is true

definition: to put off doing something until later
example: Kindra will procrastinate grading papers if there is any anime episode left unwatched.

definition: great depth of thought, feeling, or meaning
example: Kindra discusses the profundity of her favorite anime with the seriousness of a college professor.

definition: a worker who earns a living through labor rather than owning wealth
example: Kindra calls herself a humble proletarian teacher, then drops thirty dollars at Jimmy John's.

definition: using far too many words and going on too long
example: Kindra gets delightfully prolix when explaining why her favorite anime is objectively the best.

definition: to announce or make a rule or idea widely known

definition: nearness in place, time, or relationship

definition: owned by a particular person or company that controls its use

definition: to end or pause a meeting of a lawmaking body for a time

definition: a weaker country that is guarded and partly controlled by a stronger one

definition: sticking out or bulging from a surface

definition: a way of treating the mind by exploring hidden thoughts and feelings

definition: a flying reptile that lived long ago in the time of the dinosaurs

definition: a person who boxes or fights with fists as a sport

definition: eager to argue or fight

definition: a light, rough rock formed from cooled lava, used for scrubbing

definition: the marks such as commas and periods used to make writing clear

definition: the quality of being small, weak, or unimpressive

definition: the act of making something clean and free from dirt or harmful substances

definition: becoming rotten and giving off a bad smell

definition: a shiny golden-yellow mineral often called fool's gold

definition: the art of making and setting off fireworks

definition: the large muscle at the front of the thigh

definition: a flat shape with four straight sides

definition: an extremely bright and distant object in space that gives off huge amounts of energy

definition: being the most perfect or typical example of something

definition: a release from a debt or duty, or a document showing it is paid

definition: happening every day or very ordinary and common

definition: the results or effects that follow from an action or decision

definition: lowered oneself down a steep surface using a rope

definition: unpleasant and hard to like or get along with

definition: able to be brought back into agreement or made to fit together

definition: having a strong smell or strongly reminding you of something

definition: the killing of a king

definition: to bring swallowed food back up to the mouth

definition: in a steady way that never stops or gives up

definition: a strong protest or complaint against something

definition: payment given to someone for work they have done

definition: needing a lot of hard, tiring work

definition: to remove or reduce a magnetic field from something

definition: a small cup used for serving strong coffee

definition: a soothing substance that relieves irritation, especially in the throat

definition: a charge paid when a ship or truck is kept longer than the agreed time for loading

example: Kindra joked that with polydactyly she'd finally have enough fingers to grip every climbing hold at once.

definition: a hairstyle in which the hair is swept up high above the forehead
example: Kindra teased her red hair into a pompadour so tall it briefly made her look average height.

definition: a word made by blending the sounds and meanings of two other words; also a large travel suitcase
example: Kindra coined a portmanteau for her lifestyle: 'climbime,' half rock climbing and half anime.

definition: a strong liking or preference for something
example: Kindra has a well-known predilection for Jimmy John's that borders on a personality trait.

definition: having or showing knowledge of events before they happen
example: Kindra seems prescient at trivia but strangely never prescient enough to fold a losing poker hand.

definition: skillful quickness of the hands, especially in performing magic tricks; sleight of hand
example: Kindra's opponents suspect prestidigitation whenever she wins, since her actual poker skills are nonexistent.

definition: a small round pastry filled with cream and often topped with chocolate
example: Kindra ate one profiterole, then a second, then declared dessert a valid main course.

definition: reckless and wasteful spending or use of something
example: Kindra's only real profligacy is buying every anime figure that even glances at her online.

definition: to predict or foretell what will happen in the future
example: Kindra can prognosticate a movie's ending in the first five minutes, ruining it cheerfully for everyone.

definition: relating to the body's sense of where its own parts are and how they move
example: As a sports-medicine teacher, Kindra praises her proprioceptive sense right up until she trips over Moose.

definition: of or occurring in the next month
example: Kindra promised to finally win at poker proximo, the way she does every single month.

definition: an itchy feeling of the skin
example: Just describing a spider gives Kindra imaginary pruritus all up and down her arms.

definition: a drooping or sagging of a body part, especially the upper eyelid
example: By the third late-night movie Kindra's eyelid ptosis was so bad she watched the finale through one eye.

definition: great physical beauty
example: Kindra swears Moose has more pulchritude than any dog in Las Vegas, and honestly she's right.

definition: showing a lack of courage; timid and fearful
example: Kindra will scale a cliff without fear but turns pusillanimous the moment a cricket hops toward her.

definition: a sudden attempt to overthrow a government by force
example: Kindra's students staged a friendly putsch to make her play the anime opening before every class.

definition: the opening at the lower end of the stomach that leads into the small intestine
example: Kindra explained the pylorus to her class, then immediately sent hers a fresh Jimmy John's sandwich.

definition: the fifteenth century, especially in relation to Italian art and culture
example: Kindra swept the art round of trivia by knowing the quattrocento means fifteenth-century Italy.

definition: often complaining in a whining or fretful way

definition: a person who is eager to know the latest news and gossip; a busybody
example: Kindra is the group's resident quidnunc, somehow knowing every anime rumor before it's confirmed.

definition: a leafy vegetable with reddish-purple leaves and a slightly bitter taste, used in salads
example: Kindra picked the radicchio off her salad because red belongs in her hair, not her lunch.

definition: a garden flower with bright, many-petaled blooms, related to the buttercup
example: Kindra bought a ranunculus so bright it nearly matched her own red head of hair.

definition: the return of friendly relations between people or countries after a disagreement
example: After Moose ate her shoe, Kindra offered a rapprochement in the form of one very large treat.

definition: a follower of a religious movement that began in Jamaica, honoring Emperor Haile Selassie
example: Kindra aced the trivia question naming the rastafarian movement's Jamaican origins without blinking.

definition: a restaurant or tavern located in a basement

definition: a tangy French sauce flavored with herbs, capers, and vinegar
example: Kindra drizzled tangy ravigote on everything and declared it the sauce Jimmy John's is missing.

definition: a soft, orange-red mineral once used to make paint and dyes

definition: politics based on practical goals and real conditions rather than ideals
example: Kindra runs movie night by pure realpolitik: whoever brings the snacks picks the film.

definition: quick, clever, and witty conversation or replies

definition: a net or grid, such as a fine mesh used as a background in lace or on a map
example: Kindra held her lace curtain to the window and traced the delicate reseau like a tiny climbing grid.

definition: a bugle or drum signal sounded early in the morning to wake soldiers
example: Moose is Kindra's living reveille, waking her at dawn whether or not she has to teach.

definition: an underground plant stem that grows sideways and sends up new shoots and roots
example: Kindra dug up a stubborn rhizome on her balcony while Moose supervised by eating the loose dirt.

definition: relating to or living on the banks of a river or stream
example: Kindra picnicked in the riparian shade by the river until a beetle sent her sprinting to the car.

definition: the tendency or ability to laugh
example: Kindra's risibility is so easy to trigger that one anime meme leaves her wheezing for a full minute.

definition: a small fried patty or roll of minced meat, often coated in breadcrumbs
example: Kindra fried a rissole for dinner and Moose sat at attention like it was a two-hour movie.

definition: in music, played with a sudden holding back or slowing of the tempo
example: Kindra played the sad scene ritenuto slow, dragging out the tears while Moose howled along.

definition: a short poem with a fixed pattern of lines and repeating opening words
example: Kindra wrote a silly rondeau about Jimmy John's, repeating the opening line like a true poet.

definition: a substance that makes the skin turn red, often used to soothe sore muscles
example: Kindra rubbed a rubefacient on her sore climbing muscles and joked it turned her as red as her hair.

definition: having a wrinkled or ridged surface
example: Kindra gripped the rugose, wrinkled rock face and grinned like it was her favorite anime boss battle.

definition: living or growing among rocks
example: Kindra is basically rupicolous on weekends, happiest when she's living among the rocks she climbs.

definition: relating to the quick, jerky movements the eyes make when shifting from one point to another
example: Kindra's saccadic glances dart everywhere the second someone mentions a bug is loose in the room.

definition: relating to priests or the priesthood
example: Kindra treats her Jimmy John's order with near sacerdotal seriousness, like a sacred daily rite.

definition: resembling or having the qualities of soap; soapy
example: Kindra grabbed the saponaceous climbing hold, slipped off, and blamed the gym's slippery chalk.

definition: gloomy, serious, or slow to smile in manner
example: Kindra goes saturnine and grumpy only when the theater is sold out of her favorite snack.

definition: a leafy houseplant with glossy leaves arranged like the spokes of an umbrella
example: Kindra's umbrella-leaved schefflera thrives despite Moose treating it as a chew-friendly indoor tree.

definition: a sparkle or flash of light; the act of twinkling
example: The Las Vegas strip is one giant scintillation, and Kindra squints through her glasses at all of it.

definition: a person whose job long ago was to write out documents and letters by hand
example: Kindra grades papers so late into the night she feels like a medieval scrivener hunched over a desk.

definition: making or spreading rude, insulting, or untrue remarks about someone
example: The group chat's scurrilous claim that Kindra is tall is the one lie she'll actually accept.

definition: showing great care, effort, and persistence in one's work
example: Kindra is sedulous about climbing training yet mysteriously never studies basic poker odds.

definition: a back-and-forth sloshing wave on the surface of an enclosed body of water like a lake
example: Kindra jostled the fish tank and caused a tiny seiche that sloshed water onto a very unimpressed Moose.

definition: an official in a medieval household who managed the affairs of a lord or castle
example: Kindra runs her classroom like a seneschal running a castle, minus the moat and plus the anime posters.

definition: relating to a tomb or burial, or gloomy and dismal in a way that suggests one
example: The movie theater went sepulchral and silent until Kindra loudly guessed the twist ending out loud.

definition: using or full of long words
example: Kindra's sesquipedalian trivia answers use words so long the host has to double-check the spelling.

definition: in music, played with sudden, strong emphasis on a note or chord
example: Moose barks sforzando, all sudden force, the instant Kindra's Jimmy John's delivery arrives.

definition: an image, copy, or imitation of something, especially one that is not quite real
example: Kindra keeps a plush simulacrum of Moose on the couch for the days she has to teach late.

definition: the front and upper part of the skull or head
example: Being short, Kindra can prop her chin on a counter and still only clear it up to her sinciput.

definition: a large plant-eating sea mammal, such as a manatee or dugong
example: Kindra called the gentle manatee, a plant-eating sirenian, the ocean's most Moose-like creature.

definition: a person who stays somewhere for a short time before moving on
example: Kindra was a brief sojourner in Utah for college before settling into Las Vegas for good.

definition: a mistake in the use of grammar, or a breach of good manners
example: Kindra committed a serious solecism when she showed up to poker night and asked which cards were the good ones.

definition: feeling or causing a strong desire to sleep; drowsy
example: Three anime episodes deep and full of Jimmy John's, Kindra grew so somnolent that Moose fell asleep before she did.

definition: a tall grain-bearing grass grown for food, animal feed, and syrup
example: Kindra swore the trivia answer was sorghum, then lost the round because it was actually barley.

definition: relating to or like a sister
example: Kindra gives Moose such sororal affection that the dog is basically her furry little sister.

definition: a type of black tea made from large leaves, often with a smoky flavor
example: Kindra sipped smoky souchong tea and pretended she wasn't watching her fourth movie of the day.

definition: a mineral that is an important source of lithium
example: While rock climbing in Utah, Kindra grabbed a chunk of spodumene and declared herself a professional geologist.

definition: inflammation of the bones of the spine

definition: a small pouch worn at the front of a Scottish kilt
example: Kindra insisted a sporran would make the perfect bug-proof pouch, since no bug would dare climb a Scottish kilt.

definition: an organized group of aircraft, ships, or soldiers

definition: an upright bar or post used as a support or barrier

definition: a person whose job is loading and unloading ships at a port
example: Kindra hauled her climbing gear up the wall like a tiny redheaded stevedore loading a ship.

definition: the pair of foot supports that hang from a horse's saddle

definition: a violin or other stringed instrument made by the Stradivari family, prized for its fine sound

definition: a very poisonous substance obtained from certain plant seeds
example: Kindra treats a single spider like it's dripping with strychnine and evacuates the entire apartment.

definition: able to stop bleeding by drawing tissue together

definition: spread through or over with color, light, or feeling

definition: a groove or furrow, especially one on the surface of the brain

definition: a correct word or expression that replaces a familiar but incorrect one
example: Kindra corrected a friend's grammar with a smug sumpsimus, then immediately spelled 'movie' wrong.

definition: behaving as though you think you are better than other people

definition: a stop or pause; relief from something

definition: an amount that is too much of something

definition: a soft murmuring or whispering sound

definition: an imaginary graceful spirit of the air, or a slender graceful person

definition: a brief loss of consciousness caused by too little blood reaching the brain; fainting

definition: a figure of speech in which a part stands for the whole or the whole for a part

definition: a mixing of the senses, such as seeing colors when hearing sounds

definition: the straight-line alignment of three celestial bodies, such as the sun, earth, and moon

definition: a small brightly colored songbird of the Americas

definition: a large sheet of strong waterproof material used as a cover

definition: a smooth slippery coating used on pans so food does not stick

definition: an earthquake

definition: the Greek muse of dancing and choral song

definition: a part of the brain that relays sensory signals to other brain areas

definition: helping to heal or make someone feel better

definition: fresh green plants or the lush green color of growing vegetation

definition: truthful and matching what is real
